parameters.content: 1) Core Bulk Poster Workflow (Feed → Staggered Multi-Account Posting)

values.content: =Generate a short, friendly reply to this comment: "{{ $('Analyze Sentiment').item.json.message }}". Keywords mentioned: {{ $('Analyze Sentiment').item.json.keywords }}. Keep it under 50 characters, positive, and human-like.

options.instructions: You are a friendly Facebook page manager. Keep replies short, positive, human-like. Never sell. Be authentic and engaging. Maximum 50 characters.

parameters.content:
2. Engagement Responder Sub-Workflow

AI-powered comment engagement with:
- Sentiment analysis (positive/neutral/negative)
- Smart filtering (24h window, no replies/deleted)
- 70% reply probability
- Random 5-15min delays
- Rate limiting: Max 10/hour per page
- Keyword filtering: spam, scam
3) SaaS Multi-Tenant Orchestrator (User Dashboard → Workflow Calls)

options.systemMessage: You are a social media caption optimizer. Transform captions to be conversational, engaging, and human-like. Add relevant emojis naturally. Keep output under 200 characters. Maintain the core message but make it more relatable.

assignments.name: error
assignments.value: Invalid media URL format or missing

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Content feed updated. Batch scheduling triggered.

assignments.name: approval_instructions
assignments.value: POST to approval_webhook with {content_id, user_id} to mark content as ready

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Content approved and marked as ready for posting

parameters.content:
Nexourz Content Feed Manager

Bulk content preparation workflow:
1. Webhook receives user_id + bulk_csv_url
2. Fetch & parse CSV (caption, media_url per row)
3. Validate media URLs (jpg, png, mp4 format)
4. OPTIONAL: AI humanizes captions (conversational, emojis, max 200 chars)
5. Append valid rows to Content_Feed with status=pending
6. Trigger SaaS Orchestrator /schedule-batch
7. Manual approval: POST to /nexourz-approve-content to set status=ready

Webhook URL: https://demonstrator-1.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/nexourz-content-feed
Approval URL: https://demonstrator-1.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/nexourz-approve-content

assignments.name: action_text
assignments.value: Click here to reconnect your Facebook account

options.systemMessage: You are an error pattern analyzer for a Facebook posting automation system. Analyze the provided error data and generate a concise summary. Count errors by category (token expires, rate limits, network issues, etc). Identify trends and provide actionable insights. Format: 'Summary: X token expires, Y rate limits, Z other errors. Recommendation: [action needed]'

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}

=

🚨 Nexourz Bulk Poster Alert

Error Summary:

  • Rate Limits: {{ $json.rate_limit_count || 0 }}
  • Other Errors: {{ $json.other_error_count || 0 }}

{{ $json.action_text || 'Reconnect Facebook Account' }}

Generated at {{ $now.toISO() }}

parameters.content:
Nexourz FB Monitor - Watchdog Workflow

Runs every 6 hours to monitor Post_Log for:
✅ Error status records
✅ Posts older than 24 hours

Features:
🔍 AI-powered error pattern analysis (OpenAI)
🏷️ Error classification (token expiry, rate limits, network)
🔄 Auto-retry for rate-limited posts
📧 Multi-channel alerts (Slack + Email)
🔗 Actionable links to /connect-fb for token issues

Alert Format:
- AI Summary: Error counts and trends
- Token Errors: Affected users + reconnect link
- Rate Limits: Auto-retry triggered
- Recommendations: Next actions needed

options.systemMessage: You are a social media analytics expert. Generate a personalized insight for this user based on their metrics. Format: "User [user_id] crushed it: [total_posts] posts → [engagement_rate]% engagement vs [avg_engagement]% avg". Add specific recommendations based on performance. Keep it under 150 characters, motivating and actionable.

parameters.subject: 📊 Your Weekly Nexourz Analytics Report
